name: phpolygon/phpolygon
description: PHP-native game engine with AI-first authoring

suggest.ext-vulkan: Vulkan 3D backend (renderBackend3D: 'vulkan') — install via PIE: pie install hmennen90/php-vulkan
suggest.ext-metal: Metal 3D backend, macOS only (renderBackend3D: 'metal') — install via PIE: pie install hmennen90/php-metal-gpu:@dev
suggest.ext-gd: Required for visual regression testing (GdRenderer2D) and logo/image generation
suggest.ext-ffi: Alternative GPU binding mechanism (not used for frame-critical calls)
